name: Microwave Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 1/8-inch thick strips, which is easier if it is slightly frozen.
2. Combine ingredients and place with the meat in a refrigerator overnight to marinate.
3. Place the meat strips on a microwave roasting rack.
4. Set the microwave on high for 4 to 6 minutes.
5. Add time in increments of 30 seconds after the initial 4 minutes.
6. The jerky should have a color change from brown to dark brown and a texture that has changed from supple to leathery.
This recipe is from "The Complete Guide to Game Care & Cookery" and was posted to Fabfood September 1998 by melizajane@aol.com.
